sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 프리포트 맥모란은 인도네시아 광산 사고 여파에도 3분기 조정 순이익 7억 2,200만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 조정 순이익은 7억 2,200만 달러(주당 0.50달러)를 기록했으며, 인도네시아 광산 사고에 따른 일회성 비용 4,800만 달러가 반영되었습니다.
인도네시아 광산의 일시적 운영 중단으로 인해 구리와 금 판매량이 당초 가이던스 대비 각각 1%, 4% 하회했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 9월 8일 발생한 인도네시아 광산의 머드 러시(mud rush) 사고로 인해 운영이 일시 중단되었으며, 4분기 생산량은 인도네시아 사업장의 최소한의 기여만을 가정하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 구리 생산 단위당 순 현금 비용은 1.40달러로, 당초 가이던스보다 개선된 수치를 보였습니다.
3분기 영업 현금 흐름은 17억 달러였으며, 자본 지출은 11억 달러가 집행되었습니다.

watchItems.text: 인도네시아 광산 및 제련소 운영의 단계적 재개 속도와 이에 따른 4분기 생산량 회복 여부를 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a3q2025exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Freeport Reports Third-Quarter and Nine-Month 2025 Results • Third-quarter 2025 operating results: ◦ Consolidated production was impacted by the temporary suspension of operations in Indonesia since the September 8, 2025, mud rush incident ◦ Consolidated copper and gold sales were approximately 1% and 4%, respectively, lower than July 2025 guidance ◦ Consolidated unit net cash costs of $1.40 per pound of copper were better than July 2025 guidance • Strong financial position and favorable long-term outlook • Net income attributable to common stock in third-quarter 2025 totaled $674 million, $0.46 per share, and adjusted net income attributable to common stock totaled $722 million, $0.50 per share. • Consolidated production tota  Normalized numeric aliases: $674 million = 6억 7,400만 달러; $722 million = 7억 2,200만 달러; 912 million = 9억 1,200만 달러; 22 million = 2,200만 달러; $1.40 = 1.40달러; $674 = 674달러; $0.46 = 0.46달러; $722 = 722달러; $0.50 = 0.50달러.

2025. • Consolidated sales totaled 977 million pounds of copper, 336 thousand ounces of gold and 19 million pounds of molybdenum in third-quarter 2025. • Consolidated sales are expected to approximate 3.5 billion pounds of copper, 1.05 million ounces of gold and 82 million pounds of molybdenum for the year 2025, including 635 million pounds of copper, 60 thousand ounces of gold and 21 million pounds of molybdenum in fourth-quarter 2025. Forecasts for fourth-quarter 2025 assume minimal contribution from Indonesia, pending a phased restart of mining and smelting operations. • Average realized prices were $4.68 per pound for copper, $3,539 per ounce for gold and $24.07 per pou  Normalized numeric aliases: 977 million = 9억 7,700만 달러; 19 million = 1,900만 달러; 3.5 billion = 35억 달러; 1.05 million = 105만 달러; 82 million = 8,200만 달러; 635 million = 6억 3,500만 달러; 21 million = 2,100만 달러; $4.68 = 4.68달러; $24.07 = 24.07달러; $3,539 = 3,539달러; $1.40 = 1.40달러; $1.68 = 1.68달러; 3,539 million = 35억 3,900만 달러.

s totaled $1.7 billion, net of $0.2 billion of working capital and other uses, in third-quarter 2025. Operating cash flows are expected to approximate $5.5 billion, net of $0.7 billion of working capital and other uses, for the year 2025, assuming prices of $4.75 per pound for copper, $4,000 per ounce for gold and $25.00 per pound for molybdenum in fourth-quarter 2025. • Capital expenditures in third-quarter 2025 totaled $1.1 billion, including $0.5 billion for major mining projects and $0.1 billion for PT Freeport Indonesia’s (PTFI) new smelter and precious metals refinery (PMR) (collectively, PTFI’s downstream processing facilities). For  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.7 billion = 17억 달러; $0.2 billion = 2억 달러; $5.5 billion = 55억 달러; $0.7 billion = 7억 달러; $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $0.5 billion = 5억 달러; $0.1 billion = 1억 달러; $4.5 billion = 45억 달러; $0.6 billion = 6억 달러; $0.7 = 0.7달러; $0.5 = 0.5달러; $9.3 = 9.3달러; $0.1 = 0.1달러; $4.5 = 4.5달러; $2.3 = 2.3달러; $0.6 = 0.6달러; 4,000 million = 40억 달러.

and consolidated cash and cash equivalents totaled $4.3 billion. At September 30, 2025, net debt totaled $1.7 billion, excluding $3.2 billion of debt for PTFI’s downstream processing facilities. Refer to the supplemental schedule, “Net Debt,” on page IX. 1 PHOENIX, AZ, October 23, 2025 – Freeport (NYSE: FCX) reported third-quarter 2025 net income attributable to common stock of $674 million, $0.46 per share, and adjusted net income attributable to common stock of $722 million, $0.50 per share after excluding after-tax net charges totaling $48 million, $0.04 per share, primarily for idle facility costs and recovery efforts associated with the September 2025 mud rush incident at PTFI.
